note: This file is auto-updated daily by scout_agent.py via GitHub Actions. Do not edit manually.

maha_lakshmi.ageNote: Applicant must be 18 years or above.

rythu_bandhu.ageNote: Applicant must be 18 years or above and own/cultivate agricultural land.

gruha_jyothi.ageNote: Applicant must be 18 years or above (head of household).

epass.ageNote: Student must be between 16 and 35 years of age depending on the course level.

aasara.ageNote: For Old Age pension, minimum age is 57 years. For Widow/Disability pensions, minimum age is 18 years.

kalyana_lakshmi.ageNote: The bride must be at least 18 years old and the groom must be at least 21 years old at the time of marriage.

aarogyasri.ageNote: Open to all ages. The scheme covers the entire BPL family.

dalit_bandhu.ageNote: Applicant must be 18 years or above and hold a valid SC caste certificate.

kcr_kit.ageNote: Pregnant women must be between 18 and 45 years of age.

indiramma_indlu.ageNote: Applicant must be 18 years or above and must be from a BPL family.

kanti_velugu.ageNote: Open to all citizens of Telangana regardless of age.

cm_overseas.ageNote: Applicant must be between 18 and 35 years of age.

golla_kuruma.ageNote: Applicant must be 18 years or above and an active member of a Sheep Breeders Cooperative Society.

nethannaku_cheyutha.ageNote: Applicant must be a practicing weaver, 18 years or above.
